title: Privacy Policy
metaDescription: Read the ConvertBase.app privacy policy, including information about cookies, Google Analytics, Google AdSense and contact details.
heading: Privacy Policy
content: This Privacy Policy explains how ConvertBase.app handles information when you browse our pages and use our online tools.
We aim to keep data collection limited and to run as many tools as possible directly in your browser without requiring an account.

sections.title: Information we may collect
paragraphs: We may collect limited technical information such as browser type, device data, approximate location, referring pages and interaction events needed to understand site performance.
When analytics is enabled, Google Analytics may process this information on our behalf. We do not ask users to create an account to use the core public tools.

sections.title: Cookies and advertising
paragraphs: ConvertBase.app may use cookies and similar technologies to remember basic preferences, measure traffic and support site security.
Advertising services such as Google AdSense may use cookies to show and measure ads. You can learn more on our Cookie Policy page.

sections.title: Your choices and contact
paragraphs: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Some features may work differently if certain cookies are disabled.
If you have questions about this policy or your privacy on ConvertBase.app, contact contact@convertbase.app.
